${modID}:EventID.NAME: Event Name
DESCRIPTIONS: This is event text, generally used to describe what's happening.
#g~This~ #g~text~ #g~is~ #g~green~ #g~and~ #g~wavy.~
#r@RED@ #r@AND@ #r@VIBRATING@ #r@TEXT.@
#rRed #gGreen #yYellow #bBlue #pPurple. ~Wavy~ @vibrating.@
You have to mark every word individually.
You can also use [#ffffff]white[] hex color codes like this to color text.
Hex color codes also work in card text! But not on keywords, without some workarounds.
OPTIONS: Select card to remove. (You can also stick extra text like this in here.)

${modID}:PloyShop.NAME: Ploy Shop
DESCRIPTIONS: You step inside a bakery, three interesting objects sit on the shelfs
You nab Lost Robin Rondo
You nab Scripps Humpty
You nab a rare relic
You leave

${modID}:KitsyLand.NAME: Kitsy Land
DESCRIPTIONS: A familiar park greets your eyes, much to your dismay
You use FlatSnark to restore the park. The theme park is now restored to its former glory
The irritating thought makes you want to destroy it even more, and so you do, leaving behind nothing
You are uninterested in this park and leave, yet something finds it's way into your pockets

${modID}:BlueGarden.NAME: Blue Garden
DESCRIPTIONS: A familiar Garden, one you could never forget greets your eyes once again.
You lay down on the flowers and drift off to sleep.
These flowers are unpleasant they remind you of a certain someone

${modID}:ShinyStarEvent.NAME: Shiny Star
DESCRIPTIONS: You stumble upon a familiar ploy, a failed experiment. Yet somethings different about it this time, its radiating magical energy, waiting for a worth wish to grant
You wish for riches. You blink once only for you to be knee deep in pure gold coins, enough to order takeout forever!
You wish for power. Five objects fall at your feet, magical energy pulsing from them
You wish for nothing. You ignore it's request and grab what was once yours reclaiming it, then you press forward.
